prompt: You previously discussed chains and bands for strength. What about using accommodating resistance for hypertrophy specifically?
assertions: Describes the likely effect as neutral-to-positive if used intelligently
Warns against adding too much band/chain tension that makes lockout the limiter
Notes that reducing loading in stretched positions may reduce hypertrophy stimulus
Acknowledges direct hypertrophy data are sparse
Recommends moderate accommodating resistance with full-ROM challenge maintained
